_readme: v7 + 소급 타이밍 전수 검증 확정
title: You've got dirt on your nose
expression: You've got dirt on your nose

sentences.en: You two better change into robes. I expect we'll be arriving soon.
sentences.ko: 너희 둘 로브로 갈아입는 게 좋을 거야. 곧 도착할 테니까.

sentences.en: ★ You've got dirt on your nose. Did you know? Just there.
sentences.ko: ★ 너 코에 뭐 묻었어. 알고 있었어? 바로 거기.
